15_year_timeline_economic_impact.description: Established the global benchmark for carrier efficiency. Reduced nutrient leaching by 15% in liquid feed additives, translating to an estimated $12.5M in annual savings across the top tier of the feed industry.

Breakthrough in protecting heat-sensitive enzymes at 95°C pelleting temperatures. Saved the global feed industry an estimated $24M per year by eliminating the need for excessive over-dosing of active ingredients.

15_year_timeline_economic_impact.breakthrough: Precision Cation Adsorption & Gut Barrier Protection (Trial #31 & #05)
15_year_timeline_economic_impact.description: Protected an estimated $85M in market value for intensive shrimp farms in the Mekong Delta. Reduced mortality rates by 40% in antibiotic-free (AGP-Free) systems during critical ammonia spikes.

Empowering trade partners to recapture $1.5B in lost margins through real-time FCR/ROI optimization. Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC) for Silsep trade partners by 65% via the Matrix 1000 engine.
